schema_version.description: Workflow manifest schema version (independent from framework semver).

name.description: Workflow id; typically matches file stem (e.g. spec-driven from spec-driven.workflow.yaml).

transition_policy.description: Phase boundary UX policy; default manual when omitted.

auto_chain.description: Optional ordered feature phase chain override for goal_mode (full track); omit to derive from DAG.

auto_chain_by_track.description: 1.1: per-track ordered feature chain. MUST declare an entry for every non-full track that has track-only phases (no implicit derivation — plan d4a7c1e8 决策 19).

id.description: Phase id; must match harness --phase value.

tracks.description: 1.1: feature phase track membership. Feature scope defaults to ["full"] when omitted (lite membership MUST be explicit); MUST NOT be declared on global scope (globals apply to all tracks).

requires_by_track.description: 1.1: per-track requires override. A track member whose plain `requires` references a feature phase outside that track MUST declare this (no implicit drop — plan d4a7c1e8 决策 19).

skill_doc.description: Relative path to SKILL.md anchor (optional, informational).
